atoms.semantic_claim: Summit chains use a custom 7-field deposit event topic for Ed25519 node keys plus BLS consensus keys.

destinations.snippet: logs are accepted when topic is DepositEvent::SIGNATURE_HASH or SUMMIT_DEPOSIT_SIGNATURE
destinations.evidence: Summit 7-field deposit event decoding moved into Alloy EVM deposit parsing; Reth no longer needs to store the Summit topic in ChainSpec for runtime parsing.

atoms.equivalence_argument: Summit deposit event behavior is preserved in the Alloy EVM dependency, where both standard and Summit deposit topics are decoded.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Parse a genesis with a deposit contract address and verify the resulting DepositContract topic is the Summit 7-field topic, not the Ethereum mainnet topic.
atoms.notes: No Reth code change needed for deposit-topic behavior; dependency is source of truth.

summary: Atoms in this file have destination evidence or exact coverage after the feature-ordered pass.
notes: This should be reviewed with the genesis/deposit parsing behavior in spec.rs.
